INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('<div>Hello & Welcome!</div>'), ('I ♥ ClickHouse'), ('This > that'), ('✓ is a checkmark'), ('✓ is a checkmark in hex'), ('ℏ represents a horizontal bar');
SELECT decodeHTMLComponent('This <is> a test & demo of ♥ ClickHouse!');
SELECT decodeHTMLComponent('Use ✓ to confirm and the ✓ in hex is also valid');
SELECT decodeHTMLComponent('ℏ is often used in physics');
SELECT decodeHTMLComponent((SELECT html_string FROM test_strings WHERE html_string LIKE '%♥%'));
WITH (SELECT html_string FROM test_strings WHERE html_string LIKE '%>%' LIMIT 1) AS temp_html SELECT decodeHTMLComponent(temp_html);
